title: Make credits limitless — remove all credit restrictions

requirements.text: Remove all credit deduction logic from the backend. When a user generates an image or video, do not decrement their credit balance. Generation must never be blocked or rejected due to insufficient credits.
acceptanceCriteria: Calling the image generation endpoint does not reduce the caller's credit balance.
Calling the video generation endpoint does not reduce the caller's credit balance.
Generation is never rejected with an insufficient-credits error.

requirements.text: Remove all credit-gate checks on the frontend. The Generate button must always be enabled regardless of the displayed credit balance. No low-credits warning, disabled state, or credit-threshold logic should appear anywhere in the UI.
acceptanceCriteria: The Generate button is always enabled on the generation page, irrespective of the credit balance value.
No warning, tooltip, or message about insufficient credits is rendered anywhere in the app.
Credit balance may still be displayed for informational purposes but does not gate any action.

constraints: Do not remove the credit balance display — only remove gating/blocking logic.
Admin panel credit management (manual adjustments) must remain functional.
Stripe payment flows must remain intact.
nonGoals: Removing the credit balance display from the UI.
Changing any other backend logic unrelated to credit deduction.
